sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44110" key="eu)qutome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-τομέω</orth>, <sense id="n44110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a straight incision</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:8:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.8.23</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐθῠ-τομία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
